title: Novel Foreshadowing
description: planted_plot_line_id and payoff_plot_line_id are independently optional and may each be null or reference different storylines. Each non-null ID must exist and belong to the API path project; IDs, version, and audit timestamps are API-managed. Status transitions are planned to planted and planted to paid_off only; an unchanged status is idempotent. When both chapter values are integers, planned_plant_chapter must not exceed planned_payoff_chapter.
